name: Kakatiya Cement Sugar and Industries Limited
summary: Kakatiya Cement Sugar and Industries Limited manufactures and sells Portland cement in India. The company operates through three segments: Cement, Sugar, and Power. It also produces and sells sugar; and owns and operates a 17 megawatt cogeneration power plant. The company was formerly known as Kakatiya Cements Limited. Kakatiya Cement Sugar and Industries Limited was incorporated in 1979 and is based in Hyderabad, India.
